## Validation
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make build`
- [ ] `make test`

## Security Checklist
- [ ] no secrets, tokens, or credentials were added
- [ ] workflow permissions stay at minimum required scope
- [ ] untrusted PR code is not given elevated execution paths
- [ ] dependency or action version changes were reviewed
- [ ] user-controlled input is not passed into unsafe process execution
- [ ] documentation and operational guidance were updated if security behavior changed
